title: About Me
intro: John Ogletree — a Full-Stack Digital Architect with over a decade of experience bridging the gap between complex backend logic and intuitive frontend experiences.
journey: I started my journey as a self-taught developer, fascinated by the intersection of design and technology. Since then, I've worked with startups, agencies, and enterprises to deliver high-impact digital solutions.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To create digital products that are not only functional but delightful to use — where every line of code serves a purpose and every pixel has meaning.

currently.title: Currently
currently.text: Working on AI-powered developer tools and open-source contributions. Available for freelance and consulting work.
